heading_content_part: Musicolet |
Privacy PolicyPrivacypolicySummaryoThisapp does not collect any Personal or Sensitive information.oThisapp does not (and cannot) send any data out from the device by its own.
Termso

Theapp, Musicolet, this app:Refers to the software (application)named Musicolet (also known as Musicolet Music Player) whose package name is“in.krosbits.musicolet”, and it is built for Android based operating system andAndroid based virtual environments, built by Krosbits and distributed via thewebsite “Krosbits.in/musicolet” and all other platforms whose links arementioned in “Krosbits.in/musicolet”.o
We,Krosbits, the developers: Refers to the proprietorship firmnamed Krosbits which is based in India, owned by Maulik Raviya and hasdeveloped this software and managing it.o

You,the user:Refers to the user who is using this software and consumingthe services provided by it.oThedevice:Refers to a physical/virtual devicerunning onAndroid based operating system, and in which this app (Musicolet) isinstalled.oTheoperating system:Refers to Android based operating systemor virtual environment emulating an android based operating system.o“Foldersto scan”: Refers to Folders in

the device, for which user have granted thepermission to the app, and in which the app will scan for audio files and mediafiles related audio-playing functionality. User can control this from App >Menu > Settings > Song library and tags > “Folders to scan”.oAudiofiles: Refers to Files stored in “Folders to scan” whichcontains audio data encoded in various forms such as Mp3, M4a, Flac, Wav, etc.oMediafiles related audio-playing functionality: Refers to JPG and

PNG files stored in “Folders to scan” containing the AlbumArt (cover photo oftrack/album), LRC files stored in “Folders to scan” (containing the Lyrics).GeneralMusicoletis developed and being managed byKrosbitswhich is a proprietorshipfirmbased in Indiaand owned byMaulik Raviya.This Privacy Policy ("Policy") aims todescribe which data and information are obtained and collected from users andhow they are used and disclosed.By usingMusicolet, you agree that the data and

information mentioned in this Policy will be handled, processed and disclosedas described in this Policy.Personal and SensitiveInformationThis appdoes notcollect any personaland sensitive information such as personally identifiable information,financial and payment information, authentication information, phonebook,contacts, device location, SMS and call related data, inventory of other appson the device, microphone, camera, and other sensitive device or usage data.Data which are collected by this appoThis

app collects the following data:·Pathand name of audio files stored in the internal storage of the device, andstored on other storage devices (such as SD card) attached to it.Usershave full control on ‘which folders containing the audio files are read?’. Usercan control this from App > Menu > Settings > Song library and tags> “Folders to scan”.·Dataread from the ‘Media files related audio-playing functionality’ in the samefolders (“Folders to scan”).Note:Musicoletdoes not

read any other types of files (non-media files, ormedia files which is not relevant to its audio-playing functionality. Musicoletdoes notread any files contained in the folder which is not listed in “Foldersto scan”.·Metadatatags of the audio files (such as Title, Artists, Album, Album arts, Durationetc.)·Device’smodel name and manufacturer.·Versionof android operating system.·Versionof Musicolet.·Othersimilar (Non-Personal and Non-Sensitive) data required for the various

functionalities of the app. Data such as (but not limited to) device screensize, device orientation, media volume, audio route (by which speaker/devicethe audio is being played), etc.oHowthese data are used?Thisdata is used to create and maintain a music (audio) library locally on thedevice, to play audio, and for the various other functionalities of the app.oWherethese data are stored?These data are stored in aprivate folder in the device. (Location of this folder is decided by

theoperating system). Other appsdo nothave access to this folder.These collected data arepermanently deleted when the app is uninstalled or when the user clears appdata from device’s settings.oSharing and disclosing of these data:Musicoletdoesnotsharethese data with any other apps, services, person or organization.Data generated by this appoAudiolibrary and playback related data:Includes (but not limitedto): Queues, Playlists, Favourites created by the user in the app, Play-counts(how many times an

audio file is played), Last played position of songs, Settingsand options changed by the user.·Howthese data are used?Thisdata is used to provide more personalized experience in the app.·Wherethese data are stored?These data are stored in aprivate folder in the device. (Location of this folder is decided by theoperating system). Other appsdo nothave access to this folder.Thesecollected data are permanently deleted when the app is uninstalled or when theuser clears app data from device’s settings.·Sharing
and disclosing of these data:

Musicoletdoes notshare these data with any other apps, services, person or organization.oLogsdata and crash details for debugging:App collects logs data by usingAndroid’s “Log-Cat” system, when app runs into an error (crash), or when userexplicitly ask for it (by using “Report bugs” feature given in the app or by othermethods suggested by the developers when debugging or diagnosing bugs or problems).These data contain a log of system

messages, including stack traces when the device throws an error and debug messageswhich were written by the app while user performs various action in the app. Thesedata contain logs and information from 1) Musicolet app and 2) the process(Virtual machine) running the app only.These datado notcontain logsfrom other apps. These datado notcontain any Personal and SensitiveInformation.·Howthese data are used?Thisdata is used to debug and fix the problems, crashes and bugs found in the app.·Where

these data are stored?These data are stored inplain text files in the internal storage of the device.·Sharingand disclosing of these data:This app doesnot(and cannot) transmit/send these data to developersby its own. Thus, ifusers want to help the developers fixing some bugs/crash, Users have to sendthem to the developersmanuallyvia email or by other methods suggestedby developers.oManualBackups and Automatic backups:A feature of Musicolet provides users

an ability to back up their Playlists, Favorites, Playback history (recentlyplayed, play-counts) and Settings in the form of a ZIP file (referred as‘Backup file’ or ‘Backup’). User can later restore these data (Playlists,Favorites, Playback history and Settings) later from these backup files afterthe app’s re-installation on same or different device, or whenever they wishto. Users can manually create backups.Musicolet also offers an option to
create automatic backups (this option is enabled by default and can be disabledfrom App > Settings > Backup and restore > Automatic backups).These backup filesdo notcontain any

Personal and Sensitive Information.·Howthese data are used?Thesebackup files can be used to restore Playlists, Favorites, Playback history andSettings on same/different device.·Wherethese data are stored?Manual backup files arestored in the internal storage of the device by default. (Exact path can beseen in the app). In android 4.4+, users can create them in any folder theywant. Automatic backup files are stored in the internal storage of the device

by default. (Exact path can be seen in the app.) Users have option to change itto any folder they want.·Sharingand disclosing of these data:This app doesnot(and cannot) send these backup filesby its own. If users want, they cansend/share these backup files manually by using 3rdparty apps.Interaction with other apps and servicesIn order to provide some specific functionalities(mentioned below), Musicolet interacts with the following apps and services ifthey are installed on the device:o

Cast Plug-in for Musicolet:·“CastPlug-in for Musicolet” (referred as “Cast Plug-in”) is an app developed byKrosbits, which enabled Chromecast functionality in Musicolet.·Musicoletcan only interacts with Cast Plug-in when user has installed it on the device.·Musicoletinteracts with Cast Plug-in to provide these functionalities: Chromecast.·Musicoletdoes not send any Personal and Sensitive Information to this Cast Plug-in.·M
